source_pr.title: importinto: add more ut
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:

2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #43820

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: importinto: add more unit tests for the disttask import scheduler / post-process executor
failure_signature: importinto: add more unit tests for the disttask import scheduler / post-process executor
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR mainly adds new unit tests (scheduler UTs and a post-process step executor testkit case) and refactors code to export a constructor for testing. It also adjusts the Bazel test rule (file list / shard count) but does not show a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix for a specific flaky behavior, so we keep the conservative fallback classification.
fix_pattern: Add more disttask importinto unit tests (scheduler and post-process step executor). Refactor by exporting `NewPostProcessStepExecutor` for testability, and update the Bazel `go_test` rule to include new test files and adjust sharding.

evidence: evidence: add more UT + export constructor for testing (no concrete flaky signature in patch)

analysis:

Triage summary: add more UT + export constructor for testing (no concrete flaky signature in patch)
Changed files (4): pkg/disttask/importinto/BUILD.bazel, pkg/disttask/importinto/scheduler.go, pkg/disttask/importinto/scheduler_test.go, pkg/disttask/importinto/scheduler_testkit_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
